memberdef.argsstring: (float *buf, int num_heads, int tokens, int cache_capacity, int aligned_head_dim)
memberdef.name: kv_cache_repack_head_major_inplace

memberdef.argsstring: (float *__restrict kv_cache_k, float *__restrict kv_cache_v, const float *__restrict k, const float *__restrict v, int layer, int pos, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq_len)
memberdef.name: kv_cache_store

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *__restrict k_token, const float *__restrict v_token, float *__restrict k_cache, float *__restrict v_cache, int num_kv_heads, int token_index, int cache_capacity, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim)
memberdef.name: kv_cache_write_head_major

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *__restrict src, float *__restrict dst, int position, int vocab_size)
memberdef.name: logits_copy_to_position

briefdescription.para: Copy logits to position-indexed location in output buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Used in decode mode to copy single-token logits from position 0 to the correct sequence position. This moves buffer management logic from codegen to the IR layer, making codegen "dumb" - just emit kernel calls, no runtime if-statements.

sect1.title: CK-ENGINE KERNEL RULES:

listitem.para: NO malloc/free - memory via bump allocator, pointers passed in
NO OpenMP - parallelization at orchestrator/codegen layer
API must define: inputs, outputs, workspace, and memory layouts
Pure computation - deterministic, no side effects

sect1.para: After changes: make test && make llamacpp-parity-full
Small, explicit helpers used by the runtime/orchestrator to maintain per-layer KV caches during autoregressive decoding.
Layout: k_cache[kv_head, token, aligned_head_dim] v_cache[kv_head, token, aligned_head_dim] with contiguous row-major storage and stride aligned_head_dim.
